name: Bug report
about: Report a bug in gitmsg-ai

labels: bug

---

## Describe the bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce:
1. Run `gitmsg-ai ...`
2. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened. Paste the full error message / traceback if any.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11.5]
- gitmsg-ai version: [run `gitmsg-ai --version`]
- Provider: [Ollama / OpenAI]
- Model: [e.g. llama3.1:8b, gpt-4o-mini]

## Additional context
Any other context, screenshots, or config that might help.
